name: Indonesian Spiced Coconut Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, combine chicken and spice mixture. Shake until well coated.
2. Let stand in a single layer for 1 hour.
3. Saute onion in oil until translucent. Remove onion.
4. Add chicken and brown about 5 minutes per side (cut the chicken into smaller pieces to cook more evenly and get more spice per piece).
5. Return onion and any remaining spice mixture to skillet, then add sauce ingredients.
6. Simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
7. Add mushrooms and simmer uncovered for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Discard bay leaves.
9. Add lemon juice and heat through.
